benefits.description: Hopes to cut from 215 to 185 lbs while preserving muscle mass
Wants to preserve or gain muscle during a caloric deficit
Hopes improved sleep from peptides will help maintain muscle; has chronic insomnia treated with trazodone
Wants to maintain strength and accelerate cut so he can return to lean bulk sooner

side_effects.description: Concerned about potential heart and liver enlargement from GH peptides; also concerned about bone size changes with 3-month cycle

protocol_notes: OP is a 23-year-old male powerlifter planning a first peptide cycle with CJC/Ipamorelin stack on a 5-on-2-off schedule for ~3 months. Goal is to cut from 215 to 185 lbs (~12-13% BF) while preserving strength and muscle. Has very low appetite, currently eating ~1 meal/day and uses force-feeding to bulk. Takes trazodone and mirtazapine; mirtazapine helped with appetite early in the year. Has a coach and therapist who support peptide use. Blood work pending at time of post. Cycle described as planned/intended, not yet started.
